Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9F44 "DIZZYDICE-9F44" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dizzy Dice.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
